\tzpentry{ID5620}{Dipole Vector Potential Divergence Field Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5620 introduces Dipole Vector Potential Divergence Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\nabla \cdot \vec{A}_{\text{dipole}} = 0$
\]
